title: OPERATION SAUCER #13 [Operação Prato]  reports n.121 to n.130 [1978]

text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 121

- 02. PLACE: BENEVIDES-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 28 Jul78 – at 03:45 hours

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow

- 06. SHAPE: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: 5 cm

- 08 MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, East / Southeast

- 09. SPEED: Low (-200Km / h)

- 10. ALTITUDE: 4,000m (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 6,000m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): 1 S FLÁVIO and Mr. UBIRATAN PINON FRIAS

- 13. NOTE: Did not emit flashes.

- 01. REG. n. 122

- 02. PLACE: BELÉM-PA – (Vila dos SOLDADOS e SARGENTOS)

- 03. DATE / TIME: 07 Aug 78 – at 22:00 hours

- 04. DESCRIPTION:
summary: Operação Prato reports 121–130: ten sightings Jul–Nov 1978 in Pará; report 123 shows UFO directing spotlight on witness causing temporary vision loss; reports 129/130 are aerial observations by pilots.
